chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 562 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 2553/25 3.For hearing of main case 06-05-2025 None present for the petitioner. **** On 29.04.2025, the following order was passed: “None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received. This petition is liable to be dismissed for non- prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, adjourned to 06.05.2025”. Today, none present for the petitioner; no intimation is received, which reflects that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
